title: wrightia hanleyi
intro: Wrightia hanleyi, also known as Wrightia tomentosa, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Wrightia hanleyi include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Wrightia hanleyi is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and snake bites.
